title: Count Number of Nice Subarrays
hints: Transform the array into 1s for odd numbers and 0s for even numbers. The problem then becomes finding subarrays with a specific sum.
Use a prefix sum approach. For each index, you need to find how many previous prefix sums are exactly k less than the current one.
Maintain a frequency map of prefix sums encountered so far. For each step, add the count of (current_sum - k) from the map to your answer.
